description: AA-09.1 crash-only region semantics, journal format, and microreboot protocol.

crash_state_machine.description: Explicit crash-only state transitions for supervised regions.

states.description: Region is actively executing tasks and settling obligations.
Region is gracefully shutting down: no new tasks accepted, existing tasks run to completion.
Region has encountered an unrecoverable fault. Journal checkpoint is written, obligations are abandoned.
Crash journal has been durably written. Region state is frozen for replay.
Microreboot in progress: journal is replayed, obligations are re-established.
Graceful drain complete. All obligations settled, region may be reaped.
Terminal state. Region resources are fully released and cannot be revived.

invariants.description: No state transition may skip an intermediate state (e.g., RUNNING cannot go directly to RECOVERING).
TOMBSTONED is absorbing: no transitions out.
Every CRASHING state must transition to JOURNALED before any other state.
RECOVERING requires a valid JOURNALED predecessor.

journal_format.description: Deterministic journal for crash recovery and replay.

entry_types.description: Task was spawned in the region.
Obligation was entered within a region.
Controller decision was applied to the region.
Periodic checkpoint of region state for truncation.
Crash event written at the point of failure.

ordering_rules.description: Sequence numbers within a region are strictly monotonically increasing.
Epoch values are non-decreasing within a journal.
JE-REGION-OPEN must precede any JE-TASK-SPAWN for the same region.
JE-OBLIGATION-ENTER must precede JE-OBLIGATION-SETTLE for the same obligation.
Entries before the last checkpoint may be truncated without losing recovery capability.

microreboot_protocol.description: Protocol for restarting a crashed region from its journal without full runtime restart.

phases.description: Fence the crashed region: cancel in-flight I/O, detach from parent scheduler.
phases.postcondition: All region resources are quiesced and no external references remain.

phases.description: Replay journal from last checkpoint, reconstructing region state.
phases.precondition: MR-ISOLATE complete. Journal is valid and readable.
phases.postcondition: Region state matches the last consistent checkpoint.

phases.description: Reconcile obligations: re-enter pending obligations, abandon those that cannot be recovered.
phases.postcondition: Obligation table reflects recovered state. Abandoned obligations are logged.

phases.description: Transition region to RUNNING, re-register with parent scheduler.
phases.precondition: MR-RECONCILE complete. Supervision policy allows restart.
phases.postcondition: Region is RUNNING and accepting new tasks.

cancellation_interaction.description: How microreboot interacts with structured cancellation.

rules.description: Cancellation tokens for the crashed region are fenced: cancel signals are suppressed until MR-RESUME.
If the parent region cancels during microreboot, the recovery is aborted and the region is TOMBSTONED.
Child regions of a crashing region receive immediate cancellation and are TOMBSTONED.

supervision_mapping.description: How existing supervision strategies map to crash-only semantics.

mappings.crash_only_behavior: CRASHING -> JOURNALED -> TOMBSTONED. No recovery attempted.
CRASHING -> JOURNALED -> RECOVERING -> RUNNING (up to budget).
mappings.journal_action: Write crash marker, attempt journal replay with backoff.

mappings.crash_only_behavior: CRASHING -> JOURNALED -> TOMBSTONED. Parent region notified for escalation.
mappings.journal_action: Write crash marker, propagate failure to parent supervisor.

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate crash state machine transitions and invariants
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa091 cargo test --test crash_only_region_contract state -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate journal format, entry types, and ordering rules
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa091 cargo test --test crash_only_region_contract journal -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate microreboot protocol phases, budget, and cancellation interaction
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa091 cargo test --test crash_only_region_contract microreboot -- --nocapture
